zh.lifeSummary: 當Hilary Willenhall於1461年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾時，她的父親John Wyllenhall30歲，母親Alice Masters26歲。她於1500年與Richard Leveson在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1516年在英國斯塔福爾享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hilary Willenhall于1461年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾时，她的父亲John Wyllenhall30岁，母亲Alice Masters26岁。她于1500年与Richard Leveson在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1516年在英国斯塔福爾享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hilary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the medieval form of the (post-classical) Latin masculine name Hilarius (a derivative of hilaris ‘cheerful’) and its feminine form Hilaria. From the Middle Ages onwards, the name was borne principally by men (in honour of the 4th-century theologian St Hilarius of Poitiers ). Now, however, it is given almost exclusively to girls.

variants.name: Hillary
meanings: Variant spelling of   Hilary  , found mainly in North America.

variants.name: Hilarie
meanings: From the medieval form of the (post-classical) Latin masculine name Hilarius (a derivative of hilaris ‘cheerful’) and its feminine form Hilaria. From the Middle Ages onwards, the name was borne principally by men (in honour of the 4th-century theologian St Hilarius of Poitiers ). Now, however, it is given almost exclusively to girls.

en.lifeSummary: When Hilary Willenhall was born in 1461, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Wyllenhall, was 30 and her mother, Alice Masters, was 26. She married Richard Leveson in 1500, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died about 1516, in Staffordshire, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hilary Willenhall est née en 1461, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Wyllenhall, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice Masters, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Leveson en 1500, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1516, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hilary Willenhall 1461 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Wyllenhall 30 und ihre Mutter Alice Masters 26. Sie hat 1500 in England, United Kingdom Richard Leveson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1516 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hilary Willenhall è nata il nel 1461 nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Wyllenhall, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Alice Masters, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Richard Leveson nel 1500, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1516, nel Staffordshire, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hilary Willenhallが1461年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Wyllenhallは30歳，母Alice Mastersは26歳であった。1500年にイギリスイギリスでRichard Levesonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1516年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hilary Willenhall(이)가 1461년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Wyllenhall(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Masters(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Richard Leveson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1516년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hilary Willenhall nasceu em 1461, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Wyllenhall, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice Masters, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Leveson em 1500, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1516, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hilary Willenhall родилась в 1461 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Wyllenhall было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Masters, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Leveson в 1500 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1516 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hilary Willenhall nació en 1461, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Wyllenhall, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alice Masters, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Richard Leveson en 1500, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1516, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
